data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of a generic target model.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a generic target model, but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case describes a scenario involving dependency rules but lacks concrete evidence of the generic target model being implemented or validated through API reads or state checks. This leads to an inconclusive verdict as there is no definitive proof of requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing the implementation of a generic target model (core calendars + plugin/custom subjects).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the generic target model requirement.
